component.name: THS
component.summary: Hithink RoyalFlush (THS) stock market quotes and analysis

description.p: This wrapper is not verified by, affiliated with, or supported by Hithink RoyalFlush Information Network.
THS (同花顺) is a proprietary desktop client for Chinese A-share market quotes, charting, news and portfolio tracking, distributed by Hithink RoyalFlush for Linux systems.
This package repackages the vendor's official Kylin Linux build unmodified.
